notes: All 8 sites returned HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch — continuing pattern of CDN/WAF bot protection blocking the monitoring environment. Simultaneous 403 across all domains confirms environment-level blocking, not genuine site outages. SSL WARNING: All certs expire 2026-05-23 (29 days remaining), slipping back below the 30-day threshold after yesterday's 30-day reading. The cert expiry is shifting day-by-day (Apr 21: May 21, Apr 22: May 22, Apr 23: May 23) suggesting Cloudflare is issuing rolling short-lived certs rather than a single 90-day cert — auto-renewal appears to be keeping pace but the 30-day window keeps triggering. No action likely needed but worth monitoring. alerts_triggered = true due to both HTTP 403 classification and ssl_warnings.
